attacking_style: Survives in long-range breakaways rather than late attacks; showed resilience over final climbs when distanced from breakaway companions, holding narrow margins under extreme pressure.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team setup patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Can sustain effort over climbs when in breakaway situations, though suffers visibly; appears more opportunistic breakaway rider than natural climber.
vulnerability: Vulnerable to organized chase efforts by strong teams; won by only 11 seconds despite 5+ minute advantage, suggesting limited power reserves when isolated.
key_patterns: Only one race observed; insufficient data for validated patterns requiring 2+ observations.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single 2021 observation shows unexpected climbing endurance but lacks recent context for trajectory assessment
